title: Export Documents: No Fee for Amendments/Cancellations in Force Majeure Cases!
content:
# Export Documents: No Fee for Amendments/Cancellations in Force Majeure Cases!

Ek important update hai for all exporters! Government ne force majeure cases mein export documents ke amendment ya cancellation ki fees waive off karne ka announcement kiya hai. This is a big relief considering the current global logistics disruptions.

Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne Circular No. 10/2026–Customs dated March 10, 2026, issue karke yeh clarification di hai.

**Key Highlights:**

*   **What's Waived?** The prescribed fee for amendment or cancellation of export documents, jaisa ki Levy of Fees (Customs Documents) Regulations, 1970, mein mention hai.
*   **Why the Waiver?** This move comes in response to representations from trade and industry, highlighting difficulties faced by exporters when consignments need to be withdrawn or documents amended due to circumstances beyond their control. This includes disruptions in international shipping and logistics routes, often due to situations like the Middle East crisis and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
*   **Force Majeure Cases Include:**
    *   Cancellation or non-operation of flights.
    *   Withdrawal, diversion, or rescheduling of vessels.
    *   Disruption of cargo services by shipping lines or airlines.
    *   Closure or operational disruption of ports or airports.
    *   Natural disasters.
    *   Government-mandated restrictions affecting transport operations.
    *   Any other comparable circumstances beyond the control of the exporter.
*   **Procedure:** Exporters ya unke authorized Customs Brokers ko jurisdictional Deputy/Assistant Commissioner of Customs ko request submit karni hogi, along with supporting evidence jaise ki airline/shipping line communications ya port/airport notices.
*   **Validity:** Yeh relaxation circular issue hone ki date se 15 din tak valid rahegi.

This initiative by CBIC aims to provide timely relief and facilitate smooth handling of export consignments during unforeseen disruptions.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/htdocs-cbec/customs/cs-circulars)

*Published on: 11 March 2026*
